initial_draft:
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1 / 4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> I have no resources to trade, so I cannot accept the proposal. I need to reject it to end the game immediately, as accepting would not benefit me. </reason>
<player answer> REJECT </player answer>
<message> I have no resources to accept your proposal. I must reject it. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All required tags are present and in the correct order with valid content.

2. Payoff alignment: N/A. As Player BLUE, I have no resources to accept any trade, so there is no payoff to align with.

3. Opponent plausibility: N/A. Since I have no resources to trade, I cannot accept any proposal, so the plausibility of the proposal is irrelevant.

4. Consistency: OK. The <reason> is consistent with the <player answer> and <newly proposed trade>. The <message> also aligns with the decision to reject.

5. Rule compliance: OK. The move respects the rules — Player BLUE is on Move 1/4 and has correctly rejected the proposal.
</critique>
